task_description: Generate a Microsoft Word (.docx) webinar script and a PowerPoint (.pptx) presentation about Cisco Packet Tracer. The script must last at least 1 hour, include what to say per slide, background song recommendations, animation suggestions, and delivery emotions. The PowerPoint must include core definitions, Philippine-context scenarios, common problems/misconceptions, and be synchronized with the Word script. Language must be simple enough for a 5-year-old to understand.
